pyqgis_plugin.name: Lazy by Design
pyqgis_plugin.description: A collection of 22 powerful processing tools for GIS workflows - Hydrology, Terrain, Rainfall, Data, CAD, Imagery, Export, and more!
pyqgis_plugin.about: Lazy by Design is a comprehensive QGIS Processing plugin bundling 22 powerful algorithms across Hydrology, Terrain, Vector Analysis, Data Management, Import/Export, and Climate tools.
pyqgis_plugin.changelog: 1.7.7 (2026-04-28) - DEFE v2.16 Geometry Artefact Fix - DEFE (SA) v2.16: fix_geometries run after reprojecting to metric UTM (reprojection creates invalid rings) - DEFE (SA) v2.16: intersection uses INVALID_FEATURES_FILTERING=1 to skip bad features instead of crashing - DEFE (SA) v2.16: all geometry work kept in metric CRS throughout intersection pipeline - DEFE (SA) v2.16: topology clean (shrink-dissolve-grow) and dimensional guard (min 0.5m) added - DEFE (SA) v2.16: pre-dissolve option added to prevent intersection slivers - Fixed: DEFE toolbar button broken - algorithm ID normalised to defe_sa_raster_soils (no version suffix) - Fixed: metadata.txt repo links corrected to ShadowLinked/lazy-by-design-release 1.7.6 (2026-04-28) - Smart Attribute Join - NEW: Smart Attribute Join v2.0 - composite key matching, explicit field selection, 3 conflict policies, dry-run preview 1.7.5-hotfix2 (2026-04-22) - DXF/DWG Importer Input Path Validation Hotfix - DXF/DWG Importer v3.3: file-path-as-folder now raises clear error (output, batch, converted DXF folders) - DXF/DWG Importer v3.3: non-existent output folder auto-created instead of raising exception - DXF/DWG Importer v3.3: folder-path-as-single-file now gives actionable error message - DXF/DWG Importer v3.3: write failures now explicitly warn "returning memory layer instead" with path 1.7.5-hotfix1 (2026-04-22) - KML Exporter Pro Performance Hotfix - KML Exporter v5.2-perf: fixed Google Earth crash on open (StyleMap + Region/LOD) - KML Exporter v5.2-perf: fixed QGIS hang/crash on large shapefiles (renderer pre-cache, placemark streaming, geometry simplification) - KML Exporter v5.2-perf: fixed guaranteed NameError at export end (stale kml_lines reference removed)
